title: rulac negundo
intro: Rulac negundo, also known as Neem tree, is a tropical evergreen tree native to the Indian subcontinent and is scientifically classified as Azadirachta indica. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which have been shown to be effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rulac negundo include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate skin conditions, and support the immune system, among others. Rulac negundo is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and ointments, and is also used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin infections.
